verse_text: Moab, his city, is ruined, and his choice young men have gone down to the slaughter.

links.context: Lamenting in Bethlehem over the loss of her children in Moab, Naomi prefigures Rachel, who would later lament over the loss of her children to Babylon ([[JER.31:15]]) and over the children slain by Herod ([[MAT.2:16]]-18). See 4:11.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
